title: Like gmod
description: 此整合包加入了更多的关于聆听声音和真实音效的模组，加入了动作模组和一些优化模组，安装了hold my items模组，让第一人称模组也有动感。此整合包内还含有高清pbr材质包，与gmod非常相似，此整合包内并没有安装iris和纳模组，如果您要使用光影获得pbr高清材质包的效果，请安装iris和纳模组。 .This mod pack adds more mods related to listening to sounds and realistic sound effects, includes actio
body:
此整合包加入了更多的关于聆听声音和真实音效的模组，加入了动作模组和一些优化模组，安装了hold my items模组，让第一人称模组也有动感。此整合包内还含有高清pbr材质包，与gmod非常相似，此整合包内并没有安装iris和纳模组，如果您要使用光影获得pbr高清材质包的效果，请安装iris和纳模组。
.This mod pack adds more mods related to listening to sounds and realistic sound effects, includes action mods and some optimization mods, and installs the 'Hold My Items' mod to give the first-person mod more dynamic movement. This pack also contains a high-definition PBR texture pack, which is very similar to GMod. This pack does not include the Iris and Sodium mods; if you want to use shaders to achieve the high-definition PBR texture effects, please install the Iris and Sodium mods.
